title: Configuration option in the countdown widget that excludes weekends
excerpt: The countdown widget now counts based on seven days. It would be useful to only count working days, and have the option to exclude weekends. This way you can actually see in this widget if there’s enough time to finish t…

posts.author: natalie.oyen (Natalie)
posts.cookedHtml: The countdown widget now counts based on seven days. It would be useful to only count working days, and have the option to exclude weekends. This way you can actually see in this widget if there’s enough time to finish the scope.
